welcome.title: Welcome to Tarot!
welcome.description: Discover the magic of Tarot! Get daily inspiration and answers to your questions with the cards
cardOfDay.title: Card of the Day
cardOfDay.description: Start your day with a single card that offers wisdom and guidance. Simply open and get inspired
themedSpreads.title: Themed Spreads
themedSpreads.description: Ask a question about love, career, or the future. Choose a spread and receive deep insights from the cards
cardMeanings.title: Explore Card Meanings
cardMeanings.description: Read card meanings in the Library section, add your favorite cards to bookmarks
cardDesigns.title: Card Customization
cardDesigns.description: Make Tarot your own! Choose unique card styles that reflect your taste and mood
unlockPractice.title: Unlock the Practice Path
unlockPractice.description: Subscribe to unlock unlimited access to all features! Only {{price}} per year, with a 3-day free trial
